register_release.description: register a release A as active
preconditions: I can only register a release A as active if it is not the case that A is active and it is not the case that A has cleared the freeze exception
effects: Once I register a release A as active, it is the case that A is active

reserve_promotion_wave.description: reserve a release A for a promotion wave B
preconditions: I can only reserve a release A for a promotion wave B if it is the case that A is active and the promotion wave B is available and A is eligible for release in B
I can only reserve a release A for a promotion wave B if it is not the case that A has a reservation
effects: Once I reserve a release A for a promotion wave B, it is the case that A is reserved for the promotion wave B and A has a reservation
Once I reserve a release A for a promotion wave B, it is not the case anymore that the promotion wave B is available

unreserve_promotion_wave.description: unreserve a release A from a promotion wave B
preconditions: I can only unreserve a release A from a promotion wave B if it is the case that A is reserved for the promotion wave B
I can only unreserve a release A from a promotion wave B if it is not the case that A deployment has been executed and it is not the case that final checks for A are ready
effects: Once I unreserve a release A from a promotion wave B, it is the case that the promotion wave B is available

Once I unreserve a release A from a promotion wave B, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved for the promotion wave B and it is not the case anymore that A has a reservation and it is not the case anymore that A is acknowledged and it is not the case anymore that A is prevalidated and it is not the case anymore that A has been consumed by the release approver and it is not the case anymore that final approval has been granted for A and it is not the case anymore that monitoring is attached to A

register_notification_channel.description: register a release A with a notification channel B
preconditions: I can only register a release A with a notification channel B if it is the case that A is active and the notification channel B is available
effects: Once I register a release A with a notification channel B, it is the case that A is registered with the notification channel B
Once I register a release A with a notification channel B, it is not the case anymore that the notification channel B is available

unregister_notification_channel.description: unregister a release A from a notification channel B
preconditions: I can only unregister a release A from a notification channel B if it is the case that A is registered with the notification channel B
effects: Once I unregister a release A from a notification channel B, it is the case that the notification channel B is available
Once I unregister a release A from a notification channel B, it is not the case anymore that A is registered with the notification channel B

acknowledge_notification_channel.description: acknowledge a release A on a notification channel B
preconditions: I can only acknowledge a release A on a notification channel B if it is the case that A is active and A has a reservation and A is registered with the notification channel B
I can only acknowledge a release A on a notification channel B if it is not the case that A is acknowledged
effects: Once I acknowledge a release A on a notification channel B, it is the case that A is acknowledged

record_approver_acknowledgement.description: record acknowledgement of a release A by an approver B
preconditions: I can only record acknowledgement of a release A by an approver B if it is the case that A is active and A has a reservation and the approver B is available
I can only record acknowledgement of a release A by an approver B if it is not the case that A is acknowledged
effects: Once I record acknowledgement of a release A by an approver B, it is the case that A is acknowledged and A has been consumed by the release approver
Once I record acknowledgement of a release A by an approver B, it is not the case anymore that the approver B is available

apply_qa_check.description: apply a qa check C to a release A using a notification channel B
preconditions: I can only apply a qa check C to a release A using a notification channel B if it is the case that A is acknowledged and A has a reservation and A is registered with the notification channel B and the qa check C is available
I can only apply a qa check C to a release A using a notification channel B if it is not the case that A is prevalidated
effects: Once I apply a qa check C to a release A using a notification channel B, it is the case that A is prevalidated
Once I apply a qa check C to a release A using a notification channel B, it is not the case anymore that A has been consumed by the release approver

bind_artifact_to_release.description: bind an artifact build B to a release A
preconditions: I can only bind an artifact build B to a release A if it is the case that A has a reservation and A has confirmed artifact pinning with B
I can only bind an artifact build B to a release A if it is not the case that A is prevalidated
effects: Once I bind an artifact build B to a release A, it is the case that A is prevalidated
Once I bind an artifact build B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that A has been consumed by the release approver

bind_service_component.description: bind a service component B to a release A
preconditions: I can only bind a service component B to a release A if it is the case that A is active and the component B is available and A requires the release component B
effects: Once I bind a service component B to a release A, it is the case that A is bound to the service component B
Once I bind a service component B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that the component B is available

unbind_service_component.description: unbind a service component B from a release A
preconditions: I can only unbind a service component B from a release A if it is the case that A is bound to the service component B
effects: Once I unbind a service component B from a release A, it is the case that the component B is available
Once I unbind a service component B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the service component B

bind_configuration_item.description: bind a configuration item B to a release A
preconditions: I can only bind a configuration item B to a release A if it is the case that A is active and the configuration item B is available and A requires the release configuration item B
effects: Once I bind a configuration item B to a release A, it is the case that A is bound to the configuration item B
Once I bind a configuration item B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that the configuration item B is available

unbind_configuration_item.description: unbind a configuration item B from a release A
preconditions: I can only unbind a configuration item B from a release A if it is the case that A is bound to the configuration item B
effects: Once I unbind a configuration item B from a release A, it is the case that the configuration item B is available
Once I unbind a configuration item B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the configuration item B

bind_integration_dependency.description: bind an integration dependency B to a release A
preconditions: I can only bind an integration dependency B to a release A if it is the case that A is active and the integration dependency B is available and A requires the integration dependency B
effects: Once I bind an integration dependency B to a release A, it is the case that A is bound to the integration dependency B
Once I bind an integration dependency B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that the integration dependency B is available

unbind_integration_dependency.description: unbind an integration dependency B from a release A
preconditions: I can only unbind an integration dependency B from a release A if it is the case that A is bound to the integration dependency B
effects: Once I unbind an integration dependency B from a release A, it is the case that the integration dependency B is available
Once I unbind an integration dependency B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the integration dependency B

bind_dependency_ticket.description: bind a dependency ticket B to a release A
preconditions: I can only bind a dependency ticket B to a release A if it is the case that A is active and the dependency ticket B is open and A requires the dependency ticket B
effects: Once I bind a dependency ticket B to a release A, it is the case that A is bound to the dependency ticket B
Once I bind a dependency ticket B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that the dependency ticket B is open

unbind_dependency_ticket.description: unbind a dependency ticket B from a release A
preconditions: I can only unbind a dependency ticket B from a release A if it is the case that A is bound to the dependency ticket B
effects: Once I unbind a dependency ticket B from a release A, it is the case that the dependency ticket B is open
Once I unbind a dependency ticket B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the dependency ticket B

schedule_deployment_to_environment.description: schedule deployment of a release A to an environment B with a service component C and a configuration item D
preconditions: I can only schedule deployment of a release A to an environment B with a service component C and a configuration item D if it is the case that A has a reservation and A is bound to the service component C and A is bound to the configuration item D and the environment B is available and A targets the release environment B
I can only schedule deployment of a release A to an environment B with a service component C and a configuration item D if it is not the case that A deployment has been executed
effects: Once I schedule deployment of a release A to an environment B with a service component C and a configuration item D, it is the case that A deployment is scheduled for B and A deployment has been executed
Once I schedule deployment of a release A to an environment B with a service component C and a configuration item D, it is not the case anymore that the environment B is available

execute_deployment_with_monitoring.description: execute deployment of a release A to an environment B with an integration dependency C and a monitoring profile D
preconditions: I can only execute deployment of a release A to an environment B with an integration dependency C and a monitoring profile D if it is the case that A has a reservation and A is bound to the integration dependency C and the monitoring profile D is available and the environment B is available and A targets the release environment B and A requires the monitoring profile D
I can only execute deployment of a release A to an environment B with an integration dependency C and a monitoring profile D if it is not the case that A deployment has been executed
effects: Once I execute deployment of a release A to an environment B with an integration dependency C and a monitoring profile D, it is the case that A deployment is scheduled for B and A deployment has been executed and monitoring is attached to A and A has been consumed by the release approver

Once I execute deployment of a release A to an environment B with an integration dependency C and a monitoring profile D, it is not the case anymore that the environment B is available and it is not the case anymore that the monitoring profile D is available

finalize_deployment.description: finalize deployment of a release A with a service component B and a configuration item C
preconditions: I can only finalize deployment of a release A with a service component B and a configuration item C if it is the case that A deployment has been executed and monitoring is attached to A and A is bound to the service component B and A is bound to the configuration item C
effects: Once I finalize deployment of a release A with a service component B and a configuration item C, it is not the case anymore that monitoring is attached to A and it is not the case anymore that A has been consumed by the release approver

run_final_validation.description: run final validation for a release A with a service component B, a configuration item C, and an oncall roster D
preconditions: I can only run final validation for a release A with a service component B, a configuration item C, and an oncall roster D if it is the case that A is prevalidated and A deployment has been executed and A is bound to the service component B and A is bound to the configuration item C and A is assigned to the team role D

I can only run final validation for a release A with a service component B, a configuration item C, and an oncall roster D if it is not the case that A has been consumed by the release approver and it is not the case that final checks for A are ready
effects: Once I run final validation for a release A with a service component B, a configuration item C, and an oncall roster D, it is the case that final checks for A are ready

run_final_validation_with_incident_roste.description: run final validation for a release A with an integration dependency B, a dependency ticket C, and an incident response roster D
preconditions: I can only run final validation for a release A with an integration dependency B, a dependency ticket C, and an incident response roster D if it is the case that A is prevalidated and A deployment has been executed and A is bound to the integration dependency B and A is bound to the dependency ticket C and A is assigned to the team role D
I can only run final validation for a release A with an integration dependency B, a dependency ticket C, and an incident response roster D if it is not the case that final checks for A are ready
effects: Once I run final validation for a release A with an integration dependency B, a dependency ticket C, and an incident response roster D, it is the case that final checks for A are ready and A has been consumed by the release approver

apply_final_approval.description: apply final approval to a release A with a service component B and a configuration item C
preconditions: I can only apply final approval to a release A with a service component B and a configuration item C if it is the case that final checks for A are ready and A has been consumed by the release approver and A is bound to the service component B and A is bound to the configuration item C
effects: Once I apply final approval to a release A with a service component B and a configuration item C, it is the case that final approval has been granted for A

Once I apply final approval to a release A with a service component B and a configuration item C, it is not the case anymore that A has been consumed by the release approver and it is not the case anymore that A is prevalidated and it is not the case anymore that monitoring is attached to A

reapply_qa_after_final_approval.description: reapply QA after final approval for a release A using a notification channel B and a qa check C
preconditions: I can only reapply QA after final approval for a release A using a notification channel B and a qa check C if it is the case that final approval has been granted for A and final checks for A are ready and A has a reservation and A is registered with the notification channel B and the qa check C is available
I can only reapply QA after final approval for a release A using a notification channel B and a qa check C if it is not the case that A is prevalidated
effects: Once I reapply QA after final approval for a release A using a notification channel B and a qa check C, it is the case that A is prevalidated

record_channel_acknowledgement.description: record channel acknowledgement for a release A on a notification channel B
preconditions: I can only record channel acknowledgement for a release A on a notification channel B if it is the case that final checks for A are ready and A is prevalidated and A is registered with the notification channel B

I can only record channel acknowledgement for a release A on a notification channel B if it is not the case that A has been consumed by the release approver and it is not the case that acknowledgements for A have been collected
effects: Once I record channel acknowledgement for a release A on a notification channel B, it is the case that acknowledgements for A have been collected

record_approver_acknowledgement_final.description: record final approver acknowledgement for a release A by an approver B
preconditions: I can only record final approver acknowledgement for a release A by an approver B if it is the case that final checks for A are ready and A is prevalidated and the approver B is available

I can only record final approver acknowledgement for a release A by an approver B if it is not the case that A has been consumed by the release approver and it is not the case that acknowledgements for A have been collected
effects: Once I record final approver acknowledgement for a release A by an approver B, it is the case that acknowledgements for A have been collected
Once I record final approver acknowledgement for a release A by an approver B, it is not the case anymore that the approver B is available

pin_artifact_for_release.description: pin an artifact build B for a release A
preconditions: I can only pin an artifact build B for a release A if it is the case that acknowledgements for A have been collected and the artifact B is available and A is associated with the artifact build B
effects: Once I pin an artifact build B for a release A, it is the case that A has a conflict with the artifact build B
Once I pin an artifact build B for a release A, it is not the case anymore that the artifact B is available

coordinate_cross_release_artifact_pinnin.description: coordinate cross release artifact pinning for a coordinated release A on a release stream B with an artifact build C
preconditions: I can only coordinate cross release artifact pinning for a coordinated release A on a release stream B with an artifact build C if it is the case that A is active and A is eligible for stream b and A has a coordinated release with the pinned artifact C and B has a conflict with the artifact build C
I can only coordinate cross release artifact pinning for a coordinated release A on a release stream B with an artifact build C if it is not the case that A has confirmed artifact pinning with C
effects: Once I coordinate cross release artifact pinning for a coordinated release A on a release stream B with an artifact build C, it is the case that A has confirmed artifact pinning with C

record_cross_release_constraint.description: record cross release constraint for a release A using a notification channel B with a qa check C
preconditions: I can only record cross release constraint for a release A using a notification channel B with a qa check C if it is the case that A is active and A is eligible for stream b and A is prevalidated and acknowledgements for A have been collected and A is registered with the notification channel B and the qa check C is available
I can only record cross release constraint for a release A using a notification channel B with a qa check C if it is not the case that cross release constraints have been recorded for A
effects: Once I record cross release constraint for a release A using a notification channel B with a qa check C, it is the case that cross release constraints have been recorded for A

mark_release_cleared_from_freeze.description: mark a release A as cleared from freeze
preconditions: I can only mark a release A as cleared from freeze if it is the case that A is eligible for stream a and A is active and A has a reservation and A deployment has been executed and final checks for A are ready and acknowledgements for A have been collected and A is prevalidated
I can only mark a release A as cleared from freeze if it is not the case that A has cleared the freeze exception
effects: Once I mark a release A as cleared from freeze, it is the case that A has cleared the freeze exception

mark_release_cleared_with_artifact_pin.description: mark a release A as cleared with artifact pin an artifact build B
preconditions: I can only mark a release A as cleared with artifact pin an artifact build B if it is the case that A is eligible for stream b and A is active and A has a reservation and A deployment has been executed and final checks for A are ready and acknowledgements for A have been collected and A is prevalidated and A has confirmed artifact pinning with B
I can only mark a release A as cleared with artifact pin an artifact build B if it is not the case that A has cleared the freeze exception
effects: Once I mark a release A as cleared with artifact pin an artifact build B, it is the case that A has cleared the freeze exception

mark_release_cleared_with_cross_release_.description: mark a release A as cleared with cross release coordination
preconditions: I can only mark a release A as cleared with cross release coordination if it is the case that A is eligible for stream b and A is active and A has a reservation and A deployment has been executed and final checks for A are ready and acknowledgements for A have been collected and A is prevalidated and cross release constraints have been recorded for A
I can only mark a release A as cleared with cross release coordination if it is not the case that A has cleared the freeze exception
effects: Once I mark a release A as cleared with cross release coordination, it is the case that A has cleared the freeze exception

action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_configuration_item: unbind a configuration item {?configuration_item} from a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_integration_dependency: bind an integration dependency {?integration_dependency} to a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_integration_dependency: unbind an integration dependency {?integration_dependency} from a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_dependency_ticket: bind a dependency ticket {?dependency_ticket} to a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_dependency_ticket: unbind a dependency ticket {?dependency_ticket} from a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_deployment_to_environment: schedule deployment of a release {?release} to an environment {?environment} with a service component {?service_component} and a configuration item {?configuration_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_deployment_with_monitoring: execute deployment of a release {?release} to an environment {?environment} with an integration dependency {?integration_dependency} and a monitoring profile {?monitoring_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_deployment: finalize deployment of a release {?release} with a service component {?service_component} and a configuration item {?configuration_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.run_final_validation: run final validation for a release {?release} with a service component {?service_component}, a configuration item {?configuration_item}, and an oncall roster {?oncall_roster}
action_nl_templates_indef.run_final_validation_with_incident_roste: run final validation for a release {?release} with an integration dependency {?integration_dependency}, a dependency ticket {?dependency_ticket}, and an incident response roster {?incident_response_roster}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_final_approval: apply final approval to a release {?release} with a service component {?service_component} and a configuration item {?configuration_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.reapply_qa_after_final_approval: reapply QA after final approval for a release {?release} using a notification channel {?notification_channel} and a qa check {?qa_check}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_channel_acknowledgement: record channel acknowledgement for a release {?release} on a notification channel {?notification_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_approver_acknowledgement_final: record final approver acknowledgement for a release {?release} by an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.pin_artifact_for_release: pin an artifact build {?artifact_build} for a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.coordinate_cross_release_artifact_pinnin: coordinate cross-release artifact pinning for a coordinated release {?release_coordinator} on a release stream {?release_stream} with an artifact build {?artifact_build}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_cross_release_constraint: record cross-release constraint for a release {?release} using a notification channel {?notification_channel} with a qa check {?qa_check}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_release_cleared_from_freeze: mark a release {?release} as cleared from freeze
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_release_cleared_with_artifact_pin: mark a release {?release} as cleared with artifact pin an artifact build {?artifact_build}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_release_cleared_with_cross_release_: mark a release {?release} as cleared with cross release coordination

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a release or a promotion wave or a environment or a configuration item or a service component or a integration dependency or a notification channel or a approver or a artifact build or a qa check or a monitoring profile or a dependency ticket or a team role is also a object
Everything that is a oncall roster or a incident response roster is also a team role
Everything that is a release stream or a coordinated release is also a release
